title: schizoloma ferrugineum
intro: Schizoloma ferrugineum, also known as rusty-leaved spleenwort or rusty spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Schizoloma ferrugineum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
